name: Crackdown
blurb: A regulator has discovered the refresh button and a deeply personal interest in your front page.
summary: Audit chance ×2 · heat cooling reduced to 35%

name: Gold Rush
blurb: Every gambling stream claims the machine is hot. Statistically dubious; commercially magnificent.

name: Drama Week
blurb: Everyone has receipts, nobody has context, and the clip accounts are doing unpaid overtime.

name: Sponsor War
blurb: The brands doubled the cheque and halved their emotional regulation. Keep every logo smiling.

name: Slow News Day
blurb: The internet is outside touching grass. Revolting behaviour, but finance adjusted the target.
